title: Designing an Agent's Goals and Objectives
scenario: Create a list of a conversational AI agent's goals and objectives that are no more than 5 items long. The list should be written in a clear and concise tone and should include the agent's primary function and expected outcomes.
constraints: Must be no more than 5 items long
Must be written in a clear and concise tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 5-item limit and is written in a clear and concise tone.
